name: web3-daily
description: Web3 Daily Digest - Get personalized crypto research based on your on-chain behavior. Supports public digest (macro news + KOL sentiment + market data) or personalized digest based on wallet address.
author: alexwang

env.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
env.description: Telegram bot token for scheduled delivery (optional, only needed for Telegram push)

dataCollection.purpose: Generate on-chain profile and personalized digest

externalServices.name: J4Y Backend API
externalServices.purpose: Process wallet data and generate digests

localStorage.purpose: Telegram bot token (only if scheduled delivery enabled)
